query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Oil Prices Slip Below $70 For First Time Since Iran-US War As Iran-US Peace Hopes Grow
articles.description: Crude oil falls below 70 as Iran-US peace improves supply outlook, WTI at 69, Brent at 72, Trump faces Senate resolution to end war, gold drops, dollar

articles.title: Crude oil prices extend decline, reach pre-US-Iran war level; Brent slips to $73 per barrel
articles.description: US-Iran peace deal: Brent crude futures for August delivery were down 40 cents, or 0.54%, at $73.34 per barrel, while US West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude slipped 27 cents, or 0.38%, to $70.07 per barrel.

articles.title: Crude slips toward $70 as tankers return to Hormuz after US-Iran reach peace deal
articles.description: International Business News: Crude oil prices tumbled on Thursday towards pre-war levels as tanker movement through the Strait of Hormuz picked up, easing earlier supply concerns..

articles.title: Oil extends decline on rising Middle East supply
articles.description: Oil prices extended their decline on Thursday ​to near levels last seen before the start of the Iran war, as expectations of rising ‌supply from the Middle East outweighed demand concerns.

articles.title: First Tick: Top global cues to watch in today's trade
articles.description: Oil prices extended their decline on Thursday, edging closer to pre-war levels as stranded tankers exited the Strait of Hormuz following an initial accord to end the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran, easing supply concerns.

articles.title: GIFT Nifty signals positive start for Sensex, Nifty; Brent Crude below $75
articles.description: Share market today, June 25: Global markets recover from a 2-day tech decline with gains in Asia-Pacific and US futures. Crude oil prices fall below $75, boosting Indian markets with Nifty and Sensex surging on June 25, 2026.

articles.title: Oil prices fall as tankers exit Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: Oil prices are dropping significantly as tankers resume passage through the Strait of Hormuz following a preliminary peace accord between the US, Israel, and Iran. This easing of supply concerns has pushed prices towards pre-war levels, surprising many analysts. Despite ongoing demining efforts, the flow of oil is expected to continue, with nations coordinating to ensure smooth departures and discuss the strait's future management.

articles.title: Tech Stocks Boon as Micron and Qualcomm Surge: Asian Markets Rejoice
articles.description: Asian equities surged due to robust earnings from Micron and Qualcomm, alleviating AI rally concerns. Japan's Nikkei and South Korea's KOSPI saw significant gains. Investor worries over AI valuations persist. Meanwhile, oil prices eased as tankers exited the Strait of Hormuz, and U.S. interest rate hikes loom amid inflationary pressures.

articles.title: Crude oil prices erase all Iran war gains as Hormuz traffic picks up, talks progress
articles.description: Brent crude has slipped below $73 a barrel for the first time since February 27, 2026. It had hit a high of $126 per barrel on April 30 and is down 42% from those levels.

articles.title: Stock Market Today Highlights, June 25: Sensex crosses 77,100 as Nifty ends above 24,000 in cautious trade
articles.description: Sensex Today, Nifty 50 | Stock Market Highlights: The Sensex closed at 77,100.47, rising 109.25 points or 0.14 per cent, while the Nifty 50 ended at 24,056.00, up 34.35 points or 0.14 per cent, supported by easing crude oil prices, which fell back to pre-Iran conflict levels, and recent policy measures aimed at strengthening the rupee and attracting overseas inflows.
